title: What's Next After A 17% Fall In Best Buy's Stock?
text: After a 17% decline over the last year, at the current price of around $83 per share, we believe Best Buy's stock (NYSE: BBY), an electronics specialty retailer - is fairly priced.

title: As Recession Fears Loom, These Retailers' Dividends Are Well-Covered
text: Dividend growth investors want safe dividends. This article takes a look at how several top retailers fared during the GFC and how their numbers today stack up. Analysts are not currently pricing in a recession, and earnings estimates could fall significantly going forward.

title: Activist Investors Make A Run At 9 Companies — Can You Score Too?
text: Fed-up activist investors are making a run for S&P 500 companies like Disney. Could this be the push needed to drive better returns?

title: Best Buy (BBY) Stock Gains 33.1% in Past 3 Months: Here's Why
text: Best Buy's (Buy) omnichannel capabilities, including total tech and curbside pickup service are very encouraging.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - December 2022 Results
text: The 4 factor dividend growth portfolio was launched on November 1st, 2022, and is thus far off to a great start. The portfolio generated 0.28% of alpha in December and continues to outpace the S&P 500 Total Return.

title: These 5 Dividends Could Get Crushed In 2023
text: Hands up if you've been caught out by a snap dividend cut.

title: Best Buy-Owned Phone Service Faces Angry Customers After 3G Network Shutdown
text: Some Jitterbug phone users have been unable to make calls for days

title: Best Buy: A Stable Business, But Finances Have Us On The Fence
text: As dividend hunters, we were curious to see what Best Buy holds for the future and share the results of our analysis. Best Buy's 'people first' initiatives seem to have been yielding results, but at what cost?

title: My Top 15 High-Growth Dividend Stocks For January 2023
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of January. The watchlist posted a loss of 5.21% in December and finishes the year with a loss of 8.58%.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For January 2023
text: I present my top 10 High Yield dividend stocks that are poised to offer strong future returns. The annualized rate of return for this watchlist is 12.67% over the past 26 months.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio - Final 2022 Recap
